--- PAGE 86 --- (2) The amount for general corporate purposes, as mentioned in objects of the issue in the draft
offer document and the offer document shall not exceed twenty five per cent. of the
amount being raised by the issuer.
PART II: ISSUE OF CONVERTIBLE DEBT INSTRUMENTS AND WARRANTS 231. An issuer shall be eligible to make an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments
even without making a prior public issue of its equity shares and listing thereof.
